proposed_relations.description: The bus lane from St. John's Place to Eastern Parkway is a treatment component of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: Install bus lane from St. John's Place to Eastern Parkway

rationale: Treatment is a bus lane installation proposed in the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study presented to Brooklyn CB8 on September 12, 2013

evidence_refs.source_quote: Install bus lane from St. John's Place to Eastern Parkway

quarantine.note: The cited block p009_c0003 does not state any connection between the bus lane installation treatment and the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study. It describes a diagram of proposed traffic improvements but never names the project. Co-occurrence in the same presentation document is not a relation per review rules.

proposed_relations.description: Adding left turn bays at some intersections is a treatment component of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study
